name: Advanced Shipping Options
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Advanced Shipping Options","bold":true},{"text":" cover sophisticated configuration tools for optimizing your shipping processes beyond standard settings. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"These tools enable you to fine-tune shipping calculations by incorporating fuel levies, tracking links, delivery schedules, and specialized rules for different customer groups and product categories, thereby providing the flexibility to create a shipping system that precisely aligns with your business needs and carrier requirements."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Fuel Levy"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Australian shipping carriers typically add fuel surcharges to base freight costs to offset variable fuel prices. You can configure these fuel levies in your Neto control panel to match your carrier's charges. This is particularly important when using carrier rates via API or manual rate tables, since fuel surcharges aren't automatically included in the system's shipping calculations."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can query the current fuel levy rates from your carriers. Many carriers publish these rates publicly and update them monthly, such as:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tnt.com%2Fexpress%2Fen_au%2Fsite%2Fhow-to%2Funderstand-fuel-surcharges.html","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"TNT","bold":true}]},{"text":"","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"","bold":true},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fauspost.com.au%2Fbusiness%2Fshipping%2Fcheck-postage-costs%2Ffuel-surcharge","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Australia The surcharge costs are calculated as a percentage of the product's price, which can vary based on a country's current taxation rates. This means the surcharge scales appropriately with the item's value, i.e., higher-priced items naturally incur larger absolute surcharge amounts, reflecting the proportional increase in applicable taxes. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Furthermore, this approach helps customers to understand the total cost upfront and allows merchants to adjust their pricing strategy dynamically as tax rates change across different markets."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/6XOO13E2FU8B/shiprate37.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/6XOO13E2FU8B/shiprate37.png","name":"shiprate37.png","type":"image/png","size":425038,"width":2720,"height":2016,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F6XOO13E2FU8B%2Fshiprate37.png","active":true,"mediaID":1882,"dateInserted":"2026-01-13T15:16:02+00:00","insertUserID":2012,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"2012","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"This method only applies to products in the categories defined above"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Shipping categories are applied to products, allowing you to choose distinct shipping options for each one.
